name: Ceo Event Medya A.S.
summary: Ceo Event Medya A.S. engages in the event management business in Turkey. It offers services in the area of congress, entertainment, sports, fair, design, and corporate event management. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Ceo Event Medya A.S. is a subsidiary of Yeni ve Eski Medya Reklam Ajansi A.S.
